title: Holes Result
description: Returns the number of holes found within a Blob object.
notes: A hole is a blob with opposite polarity located within the blob that was found.  Holes that intersect the edge of the blob are not counted.
see_also:
Applies To

Vision Objects: Blob, DefectFinder
